states.name: draft
states.description: Provider definition exists but is not approved for materialization.
entry_requirements: Owner, provider kind and initial immutable Provider Revision are recorded.

states.name: active
states.description: Provider definition may have compatible Provider Instances created under policy.
entry_requirements: Approved Provider Revision and review evidence exist.

states.name: deprecated
states.description: Provider remains supported under a bounded compatibility window while replacement is preferred.
entry_requirements: Deprecation reason, replacement and compatibility window are recorded.

states.name: retired
states.description: No new Provider Instances may be created; retained history remains readable.
entry_requirements: Active-instance reconciliation and retention policy are recorded.

required_preconditions: Stable Provider identity and first immutable Revision exist.
Compatibility, provenance, capability and conformance review pass.
Reason, replacement and support window are recorded.
No new Instances are permitted and existing Instances are reconciled.
